last_episode_to_air.name: Grand Finale - Philippines Season 2
last_episode_to_air.overview: The eliminated queens return and strut their stuff on the runway before Mama Pao crowns the Philippines' next drag superstar in an epic lip sync smackdown for the crown! The finale also boasts three gag-worthy looks and the announcement of Miss Congeniality.

name: Drag Race Philippines
overview: The hit global drag phenomenon is now in the Philippines! Watch as 12 iconic queens slay and race to the finish line and compete to be the first ever Drag Race Superstar from the Philippines. It’s the Filipinos’ time to shine, henny... and you ain’t seen nothing yet!

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Featuring some of the fiercest queens in the country, Drag Race Philippines is the ultimate test of creativity, charisma, uniqueness, and talent. From dazzling runway looks to unforgettable lip-sync performances, these queens will stop at nothing to be crowned the country's first-ever drag superstar.

episodes.name: Mabu-Heeey!
episodes.overview: Meet the 12 fiercest queens in the country as they pose their way into new heights. And on the main stage, it’s a showdown in the first ever Totally Impressive Talent Extravaganza variety show!

episodes.name: Sagalamazon
episodes.overview: It will be a slippery climb for the queens while keeping it fierce in their race to the top! And on the Main Stage, the queens create their best looks out of flowers, and showcase them on the very first Drag Flower Festival.

episodes.name: Pop Off Ate!
episodes.overview: The queens show us what girl power is all about as they team up and battle it out to become the Philippines’ fiercest girl groups! Who will make it to the top charts and leave their mark, and who will pop right off? Moophs and Nadine Lustre guest star.

episodes.name: OPM Divas: The Rusical
episodes.overview: The queens pay homage to the female icons of Original Filipino Music (OPM) in the first ever Philippine Rusical. Asia’s Songbird, Regine Velasquez-Alcasid guest judges.

episodes.name: Miss Shutacca
episodes.overview: The queens act and improvise as they sashay into the Beauty Pageant extravaganza of their lives! Who will be crowned? It’s for you to find out as Miss Universe 2015, Pia Wurtzbach, joins the judges panel.

episodes.name: Snatch Game KNB?
episodes.overview: The queens present their best celebrity impersonations in the much awaited Snatch Game! These copycats are ready for their hilarious and cutthroat close-ups!

episodes.name: Shop Shop Ladies Ball
episodes.overview: “Shopulence, She Buys Everything!” Which queens will make it out alive in their two of a kind shopping ball challenge, with their second look, “Divi Divas” being a design challenge made out of unconventional materials from Manila’s shoppers' haven, Divisoria?

episodes.name: Twinning
episodes.overview: The queens transform their loved ones into their own drag family. Category is Drag Family Rusemblance! With special guest judge, One Size Beauty Makeup Maven, Patrick Starrr.

episodes.name: Charot of Fire
episodes.overview: Watch the queens get physical as they fight for their spot in the top four and star in their very first dragtastic music video! The King of Philippine Talk, Boy Abunda, guest judges.

episodes.name: Grand Finale
episodes.overview: The competition reaches epic proportions as the top four queens compete to become the FIRST Drag Superstar from the Philippines in their final lip sync smack down for the crown!

episodes.name: Grand Opening Part 1
episodes.overview: Mabuheeey and welcome to Drag Race Philippines Season 2! Meet the first 6 queens as they conquer their fears and pose with a tarantula in a glamorous Mini Challenge photoshoot. The most editorial shot wins! On the Main Stage, watch them pop off in their Girl Group and perform their soon-to-be-hit bop “Boogsh!" On the runway, the category is “Feather You Like it Or Not!”

episodes.name: Grand Opening Part 2
episodes.overview: Meet the next batch of queens as they face their fears and pose with a snake in a glamorous Mini Challenge photoshoot. On the Main Stage, watch them pop off in their Girl Group rendition of the soon-to-be-hit bop, ”Boogsh”! On the runway, category is “Fringe With Benefits!”.

episodes.name: Who Wore It Bettah?
episodes.overview: The two groups of queens meet and play the hilarious "Lolapalooza Newspaper Dance" in granny drag! They then go head-to-head in a fierce design battle to prove "Who Wore It Bettah?" Fashion icon Tessa Prieto guest judges!

episodes.name: Snatch Game - Philippines Season 2
episodes.overview: The queens do a traditional dance through fast-moving bamboo sticks in the exhilarating "Tinikling For Your Life!" Mini Challenge. They then showcase their best celebrity impersonations in the star-studded "Snatch Game KNB?". And on the runway, category is "Uhh La Lam Realness!"

episodes.name: Sirena: The Rusical
episodes.overview: Hold onto your seats as the queens engage in a fierce round of musical chairs in the Mini Challenge "Upuan Mo Ako" (Sit On Me!). On the Main Stage, the queens make a splash as they unleash their talent and charisma in the musical sensation, "Sirena: The Rusical!" On the runway, the category is "The Shoooes!" Philippine multimedia superstar Anne Curtis guest judges!

episodes.name: Dramarama Mama!
episodes.overview: The queens select puppets representing their fellow contestants and engage in a sassy "bitchfest" in the hilarious "Puppet Ate!" Mini Challenge. Then, brace yourself as they showcase their acting skills in Drag Race Philippines’ very first acting challenge, a side-splitting soap opera spoof about babies switched at birth. And on the runway, category is "Can I Get An Alien?". The Diamond Star of the Philippines, Maricel Soriano, mentors the queens and graces the judging panel.

episodes.name: Twinning: The Shequel
episodes.overview: The queens makeover members of the Golden Gays (a Philippine non-profit organization that provides support and care facilities for elderly LGBTQIA+ people) and transform them into their drag sisters. Beauty Queen Gloria Diaz guest judges!

guest_stars.character: Self - Special Guest / M1ss Chloe Larosu So
guest_stars.name: Jerry Javier

guest_stars.character: Self - Special Guest / Carmen Dela Rue
guest_stars.name: Al Enriquez

episodes.name: Branding-Ding-Ding!
episodes.overview: The queens showcase their brand of fabulousness as they peddle their very own shampoo product in the Branding Challenge. On the runway, the category is Rainbow Runway Realness! Thai Drag Superstar Pangina Heals guest judges!

episodes.name: The Main Event
episodes.overview: This is the Main Event, are you ready? Watch the queens sashay on the red carpet and perform their music video that will culminate in a live performance as the competition reaches epic proportions! On the runway, the category is Doble Kara Realness! Internet sensation Bretman Rock guest judges.

episodes.name: Grand Finale - Philippines Season 2
episodes.overview: The eliminated queens return and strut their stuff on the runway before Mama Pao crowns the Philippines' next drag superstar in an epic lip sync smackdown for the crown! The finale also boasts three gag-worthy looks and the announcement of Miss Congeniality.

2.name: Season 2
2.overview: Featuring some of the fiercest queens in the country, Drag Race Philippines is the ultimate test of creativity, charisma, uniqueness, and talent. From dazzling runway looks to unforgettable lip-sync performances, these queens will stop at nothing to be crowned the country's first-ever drag superstar.
